description: SalesBlink is an AI cold email tool that automates personalized sequences and follow-ups, with email warm-up, a meeting scheduler, and a unified inbox.
overview: SalesBlink automates AI-assisted cold email campaigns with personalized follow-ups, warm-up to protect deliverability, a meeting scheduler, and a unified reply inbox.
what_is: SalesBlink is an AI cold email platform that runs consistent outreach for sales teams. It generates and customizes sequences, automates follow-ups, and includes warm-up so messages land in the inbox rather than spam.

It is strongest at booking meetings and managing leads for B2B outreach. Teams can launch automated sequences and schedule calls without back-and-forth email, and the warm-up feature protects sender reputation as volume grows.

SalesBlink fits the GTM stack as an outreach and email-automation tool, integrating with calendars and inboxes. It is not built for complex CRM or deep data enrichment; it focuses on cold email and scheduling.
